A one-day conference on 'Satellite Imagery and the News Media'

February 1996
Journalism & NewsroomTechnology

A one-day conference on satellite imagery and its applications in news media will be held March 7 at American University in Washington, D.C., sponsored by multiple organizations including the Poynter Institute and the Miami Herald.

A one-day conference on "Satellite Imagery and the News Media" will be held March 7 at American University in Washington, D.C. The conference is being sponsored by American University, the Poynter Institute, the Miami Herald, Earthwatch, the U.S. Geological Survey, and For more information, call Professor Chris Simpson at (202) 885-2037, or fax him at (202) 885-2099.
